evals.prompt: Design a GraphQL schema for a blogging platform. I need queries for fetching a post by ID, and a paginated list of posts. Posts have an author and comments.
evals.expected_output: GraphQL schema definition (SDL) for a blog.
expectations: Defines types for Post, Author, and Comment
Includes a Query type with post(id: ID!) and posts queries
Implements cursor-based or offset-based pagination for the posts list
Uses appropriate GraphQL types (String!, ID!, Int)

evals.prompt: How do I solve the N+1 query problem when fetching posts and their authors in my GraphQL resolvers using Node.js?
evals.expected_output: Explanation and implementation pattern for DataLoader.
expectations: Identifies the N+1 problem in graph traversal
Recommends using DataLoader (or similar batching mechanism)
Provides a code example of a DataLoader implementation
Shows how to inject DataLoader into the GraphQL context and use it in a resolver
